commit_scope: Add source-backed native witness export and oracle-label rows to the witness heldout learning floor.

commands: coord join && coord claim "witness oracle label export floor"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/witness-state-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/witness-state-receipt-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validation returned 1048575 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The manifest gate returned `PASS-4WAY witness-state-receipt`. The recipe now validates native-witness-export rows, rejects raw-media exports, validates oracle-label rows for STT, vision, multimodal, and GPU teacher protocols, rejects fixture providers, creates heldout rows from source-backed labels, and gates native retirement on source-backed labels plus long-window native wins. No Python receipt helper was extended.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this Form recipe slice.

phase_gate.gate: Oracle teacher labels must be source-backed by native witness export rows before native candidates can retire a teacher.
phase_gate.next: Connect live STT, vision, multimodal, and GPU oracle processes to emit these source-backed label rows continuously.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Heldout learner rows now distinguish source-backed oracle labels from fixtures. Fixture providers and raw-media exports are rejected, while native witness export receipts plus real teacher-label protocol rows can create heldout histories and retire a narrow teacher only after enough native wins.
test_flows: Native witness export rows require source, transport, sequence, frames, sample count, checksum, and summary-only privacy.
Oracle labels require non-fixture provider, protocol, label value, confidence, export sequence match, sample reference, and summary-only privacy.
Source-backed labels produce valid heldout rows.
Native retirement requires source-backed labels plus a long enough native-win window.
e2e_validation.summary: The established floor is source-backed oracle-label/export validation for witness heldout learning. Remaining gaps are live oracle process integration and continuous native witness service export.
